conditions.order: Study/Explore alternated by repetition and scenario
conditions.thinkingTime: automation-only; no artificial child thinking delay
conditions.plannerTruth: fixed UI fixture; production planner authenticity remains a separate gate

semantics.missAtQ4Q8: Diagnostic recovery/friction evidence. Study shows correction then advances; Explore retries and corrects the same question.
semantics.incorrectTiming: The 550ms gate applies only to Explore same-question operability. Study correction feedback and explicit advance are reported separately.
semantics.exploreRunShape: 8 answers, real return, real summary/restart, then 2 answers.
semantics.interruptions: Every required non-answer click is counted; automation clicks immediately, so child decision time is not included.
